_doc: TikTok + Instagram niche watchlist for tools/engagement.py scan (YouTube list lives in competitor-watchlist.json). verified = how the handle was confirmed on 2026-07-21; 'candidate' = named in curated lists but handle not URL-confirmed — collectors fail visibly per handle, prune candidates that error on first scan. Instagram handles are bare usernames (Business Discovery API); targets must be business/creator accounts or the API errors for that row.

tiktok.note: macro chart storytelling; YouTube watchlist anchor
Bloomberg/Yahoo journalist; daily market news greenscreen — closest to our lane

instagram.note: daily-recap trading community; YouTube watchlist sibling; replaced themaverickofwallstreet (personal-type, API-blocked)
large-account comment-hack target; macro charts daily
